# @swqt/ui

> AI / agent quick index. Prefer AGENTS.md for rules.

## Package

- Name: `@swqt/ui`
- Peers: React 19, Radix family, lucide, CVA, … (see package.json)
- Tokens: require `@swqt/ui-tokens/tokens.css` in the app

## Must read

- AGENTS.md
- MCP `swui://foundation/contract`
- docs/HTML-STANDARDS.md
- docs/DESIGN-SUMMARY.md
- docs/COMPONENT-CATALOG.md
- docs/DO-AND-DONT.md
- docs/ADOPTION.md

## Blocking consumer contract

- Fonts/glyphs: repository stacks and documented scale only; no external fonts or emoji-as-icons
- Icons: `lucide-react` named imports only; no second library or ad hoc SVG
- Colors: semantic `@swqt/ui-tokens` utilities only
- Controls: exported `@swqt/ui` primitives; no source copy or local fork
- HTML: native standards first; ARIA only for semantic gaps
- Actively consult `https://ui.swqt.net/colors`, `/typography`, `/icons`, and the exact `/components/...` demo

## Theme

- ThemeProvider resolves system, light, and dark preferences globally
- ThemeControl renders the standard global preference menu

## Includes

- Primitives (Button, forms, tables, overlays, …)
- WideScreenGate / WideScreenPlaceholder

## Not in this package

- AppShell / TopBar / product route IA
- Runtime API clients / business features
- Components showcase host app
- Separate ui-shell package (folded here)

## Sibling

- `@swqt/ui-tokens` — CSS tokens
